subcodes.first_line: O Munir! Luminous bodies are of two kinds: one deriveth its radiance from another, its light being but a borrowed illumination [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منیر اجسام منیره بر دو قسمند یکی مستفیض از غیر که نورانیت او ایت مستودعیست
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge
